channel.title: +Hart on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Hart on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.description:
pm logo திருநாவுக்கரசர் தேவாரம் ஆங்கில மொழிபெயர்ப்பு (முதல் 1000 பாசுரங்கள்) கௌசல்யா ஹார்ட்

tirunAvukkaracar tEvaram, first 1000 pAcurams English Translation by Kausalya Hart In Tamil script, unicode/utf-8 format Acknowledgements: We thank Dr. Kausalya Hart (Univ of California, Berkeley, CA, USA, retired) for providing a soft copy of this translation work of hers and for permission to include it as part of Project Madurai Collections. Preparation of HTML and PDF versions: Dr. K. Kalyanasundaram, Lausanne, Switzerland.
